title: Styphelia lavarackii

The plant is a shrub that is typically found in coastal heath and woodlands. Styphelia lavarackii is a member of the genus Styphelia, which is a group of plants that are often referred to as "heath plants". The classification of Styphelia lavarackii is as a species within the subfamily Epacridoideae.
